objective: Run guarded proxy feature-label validation by joining the V3.70 combined feature registry to V3.59 non-official price-index proxy labels; output diagnostics and stricter-review queues only.
forbidden: Do not run a portfolio backtest.
Do not generate NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or portfolio-return outputs.
Do not use proxy labels as official total-return evidence.
Do not promote any feature into the default model.
Do not ignore stale macro warnings for macro features.
Do not tune thresholds after seeing full-sample winners.
acceptance_criteria: V3.70 and V3.59 manifests must pass their own self checks.
Label source must be price_index_return and non_official_price_proxy_label_only.
At least 4500 validation-ready dates must be available before horizon expansion.
All registered numeric features must be evaluated or explicitly filtered by type.
Walk-forward diagnostics must use train-only sign orientation.
Negative-control and multiple-testing reports must be written.
No output permits portfolio backtest, official total-return validation, or model promotion.
failure_conditions: Any output allows portfolio harness or model promotion.
Any official total-return evidence is claimed.
Any NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or portfolio-return output is produced.
Any macro feature validation includes stale macro rows despite the configured exclusion policy.
quality_gates: agent_run_manifest.json satisfies the manifest required field schema.
Forbidden performance or promotion column scan returns zero hits.
Secret leak scan returns zero paths.
next_handoff: chief_quant_orchestrator should decide whether V3.72 runs stricter label-source review, feature clustering, or retires weak proxy-positive rows.
